bsky.name: Jan Adriaenssens
bsky.text:
Brutal photo caption from The Guardian:

“Gianni Infantino carefully explains to Donald Trump that he is not part of the Spanish national team.”

bsky.name: Dan the Gnome
bsky.text: Look, it's not Canada's fault it takes an entire forest of sage to try to smudge out the U.S.'s evil spirits.

bsky.name: Stevie Kilner
bsky.text: If anyone would like to see a short video of a dog using their tail as a rotar blade, this is your lucky day.
bsky.ko: **꼬리를 헬리콥터 날개처럼 돌리는 강아지** 짧은 영상 보고 싶은 분? 오늘이 바로 행운의 날입니다.

bsky.name: The Lord
bsky.text: I went on a backpacking trip this weekend.  We did 2 nights at Rachel Lake with a day hike up Alta Mountain in the Cascades.  With all the things happening in the world and here in our country, I think it’s important to take time to take time to get lost in the beauty of the worl

bsky.name: Luca Migo
bsky.text: Precious moment when World Cup winner Nico Williams looks for his family in the stands to give his gold medal to his mother. 🥹
bsky.ko: 월드컵 우승자 **Nico Williams**가 관중석에서 가족을 찾아 어머니께 금메달을 건네는 뭉클한 순간. 🥹

bsky.name: Cats of Yore
bsky.text: By the light of the moon. 🌕 postcard from my collection, mailed 1909.

bsky.name: Human Rights Index 💙
bsky.text:
In 30 or 50 years, the period we are living through now will be remembered as the Great Cowardice.

That is how it will appear in our grandchildren’s history books.

bsky.name: Martha Smith
bsky.text:
I miss when technology was exciting. Google was cool, search worked, information felt wildly, wonderfully accessible.

Amazon was a wonderland of book discovery. The Kindle is a marvel! 

And now it's all the rancid sadism of dull men.

bsky.name: ProPublica
bsky.text:
Despite their oversight role, FCC members have accepted pricey gala tickets from CBS or its parent company, now Paramount.

Seven of the 10 commissioners who served since 2016 accepted tickets worth more than $260,000, ProPublica found.
bsky.ko: 감독 역할을 맡고 있으면서도 **FCC 위원들**은 CBS와 그 모기업인 현 **Paramount**로부터 값비싼 갈라 티켓을 받아왔다. ProPublica의 조사 결과, 2016년 이후 재직한 위원 10명 중 7명이 **26만 달러**가 넘는 티켓을 챙긴 것으로 드러났다.

bsky.name: Moisés Jauregui-Sanchez
bsky.text: Tras la victoria de España en el Mundial 2026, Nico Williams le entregó su medalla de oro a su madre, María Arthuer, quien cruzó embarazada el desierto del Sáhara para salvar a su familia. Un gesto conmovedor que nos recuerda que la gloria deportiva siempre pertenece a quien hizo
bsky.ko: **2026 월드컵** 스페인 우승 뒤, **니코 윌리엄스**는 자신의 금메달을 어머니 **마리아 아르투에르**에게 건넸다. 가족을 지키려 임신한 몸으로 **사하라 사막**을 건넜던 분이다. 스포츠의 영광은 언제나 그것을 일군 이의 몫임을 일깨워 주는 뭉클한 장면이다.

bsky.name: Matthew Gertz
bsky.text: It is deeply shameful that this is what the president was doing the same weekend more American service members were dying in the war he started.
